name: qutrit-tree-stage
description: The Tree Behind the Gates - browser stage (Poincare disk, pixi.js v8)

scripts.build:web: node scripts/copy-py.mjs && tsc --noEmit -p tsconfig.json && VITE_BACKEND=pyodide vite build
scripts.build:lib: tsc src/hyperbolic.ts src/tree.ts src/walk.ts --outDir test/build --module nodenext --moduleResolution nodenext --target es2022 --strict --skipLibCheck
